description: Code intelligence benchmark for fastmcp codebase (~766 files). Tests blast radius, drift scoring, and risk profiling — the capabilities where Glyphh has no grep equivalent.

test_cases.query: I'm about to edit src/fastmcp/server/auth/oauth_proxy/proxy.py — what other files might break?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: OAuth proxy — high coupling

test_cases.query: I'm editing src/fastmcp/server/middleware/middleware.py — what else could be affected?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: middleware base — many dependents

test_cases.query: I need to refactor src/fastmcp/tools/base.py — what else will need changes?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: tool base class — subclasses + server

test_cases.query: I'm changing the dependency injection in src/fastmcp/server/dependencies.py — what files could break?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: DI engine — 64 importers, core infrastructure

test_cases.query: What's affected if I refactor src/fastmcp/server/context.py?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: request context — passed through entire pipeline

test_cases.query: I need to modify src/fastmcp/server/providers/base.py — what else will need changes?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: provider base — all provider implementations depend on it

test_cases.query: What breaks if I change src/fastmcp/exceptions.py?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: exception hierarchy — 51 importers across server and client

test_cases.query: I'm editing src/fastmcp/server/auth/auth.py — what other files are affected?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: auth orchestrator — 43 importers, core auth system

test_cases.query: Score drift for src/fastmcp/server/server.py
test_cases.description: Drift: core server — high-traffic file, any change matters

test_cases.query: Score drift for src/fastmcp/server/context.py
test_cases.description: Drift: request context — passed through entire pipeline

test_cases.query: Score drift for src/fastmcp/exceptions.py
test_cases.description: Drift: exception hierarchy — 51 importers

test_cases.query: What is the risk profile of the current working tree?
test_cases.description: Risk: aggregate drift for all uncommitted changes

test_cases.query: Score risk for the last commit
test_cases.description: Risk: aggregate drift for the previous commit

test_cases.query: function tool decorator and registration
test_cases.description: Find tool registration

test_cases.query: dereference middleware for resolving references
test_cases.description: Find dereference middleware

test_cases.query: server timing measurement middleware
test_cases.description: Find timing middleware

test_cases.query: function resource that returns dynamic content
test_cases.description: Find function-based resource

test_cases.query: Add a max_retries parameter to the rate limiting middleware
test_cases.description: Edit task: modify rate limiter

test_cases.query: Add request logging to the authorization middleware
test_cases.description: Edit task: add logging to auth

test_cases.query: Fix the SSE connection handler to support keep-alive pings
test_cases.description: Edit task: fix SSE handler

test_cases.query: Add a timeout parameter to the caching middleware
test_cases.description: Edit task: modify cache timeout

test_cases.query: Update the telemetry module to support OpenTelemetry spans
test_cases.description: Edit task: enhance telemetry

test_cases.query: TypeError in tool_transform.py when transforming async functions
test_cases.description: Debug task: find error source in tool transform

test_cases.query: Connection refused error in the HTTP SSE transport
test_cases.description: Debug task: find connection error source

test_cases.query: Authentication token not being passed through middleware chain
test_cases.description: Debug task: trace auth token flow

test_cases.query: How does the middleware chain work in FastMCP?
test_cases.description: Understand: middleware architecture

test_cases.query: How are tools registered and dispatched?
test_cases.description: Understand: tool dispatch system

test_cases.query: How does the rate limiter check if a request exceeds the limit?
test_cases.description: Context: find specific function in rate limiter

test_cases.query: What happens when an SSE connection is first established?
test_cases.description: Context: find connection setup in SSE transport

test_cases.query: How does the authorization middleware validate bearer tokens?
test_cases.description: Context: find token validation logic

test_cases.query: How are function arguments parsed from the tool call input?
test_cases.description: Context: find argument parser function

test_cases.query: How does the caching middleware decide if a response should be cached?
test_cases.description: Context: find cache decision logic
